persona.name: James Okafor
persona.description: James is a 36-year-old IT administrator managing a 500-person company's SaaS tooling. He handles bulk user provisioning, SSO configuration, API integrations, and license management. He communicates in a technical, no-nonsense style, prefers self-service docs over chatting with support, and only reaches out when blocked. His tickets tend to be detailed, well-documented, and often involve API or integration issues.

tickets.subject: SCIM provisioning fails for users with special characters
tickets.resolution: Bug fix deployed - SCIM endpoint now handles UTF-8 display names

tickets.subject: SSO SAML assertion failing after IdP cert rotation
tickets.resolution: Certificate cache cleared, new cert uploaded via admin API

tickets.subject: Bulk user deprovisioning via API returns 429

values: We're hitting rate limits on the /api/v2/users endpoint when deprovisioning. Current batch size is 50. Request headers and response attached.
After rotating our Okta IdP certificate, SAML assertions are rejected with error 'invalid_signature'. Our metadata XML is attached.
Need to provision 75 new users before Monday. SCIM sync is returning 500 for 12 users — all have accented characters in display_name. Logs attached.
Our audit log export via API is missing events from Nov 1-3. GET /api/v2/audit?from=2024-11-01 returns empty results for those dates.
Requesting a dedicated rate limit increase for our org. We run nightly sync jobs that require ~2000 API calls within a 15-minute window.
neutral
professional
urgent
Hi James, I've escalated this to our API team. The 429 responses are expected at batch size 50 — I'll request a rate limit increase for your org.
The SCIM issue has been identified as a bug in our UTF-8 handling. A hotfix will deploy today. I'll confirm once it's live.
I've increased your org's rate limit to 500 req/min. Please test your sync job and let me know if you hit any issues.
Good news — the audit log gap was caused by a replication lag on Nov 1-3. The data has been backfilled. Please re-run your export.
Your dedicated CSM has been looped in. We'll schedule a call to discuss your Q1 provisioning needs and API usage patterns.
agent_tier2_eng
agent_csm
agent_api_team
/api/v2/users
/api/v2/users/bulk
/api/v2/groups
/api/v2/scim/Users

annotations.communication_style: technical, concise, includes logs and reproduction steps
annotations.lifetime_notes: High-value enterprise account, technically self-sufficient, only contacts support for blocking issues
